## Describe the bug

A clear, concise description of the problem.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behaviour:

1. Run `aiswitch …`
2. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Paste any error output here.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. macOS 15.3, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11 |
| Shell | e.g. zsh 5.9, bash 5.2 |
| aiswitch version | `aiswitch --version` |
| Go version | `go version` (if built from source) |

## Additional context

Any other context (config snippets, log output, screenshots).
